name: Insurance policy underwriting agent
description: an insurance policy-underwriting agent for new auto policies. validate the application, then in parallel pull driving record, vehicle, and prior-claims data. route high-risk applications to a human underwriter. reads the policy administration system and writes the underwriting decision.
acceptance_criteria: a quote must be produced within 90 seconds at the 95th percentile
nfrs: all applicant PII must be encrypted at rest and in transit
